description: When a policy expects a context field and the field is omitted from the request, the engine denies rather than allowing or returning ambiguous, regression-locking deny-by-default semantics per agentic-policy-engine ADR-0001.
note: This vector regression-locks the bug fixed during WP 3.1 where a 'not' condition incorrectly evaluated to allow when the inspected context field was None. Symmetric with the gt-operator None-guard.
